Providers with more than one non-error result are rejected.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

type DB struct{}

type Pair struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewPair() (*Pair, *DB) { return nil, nil }
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:7:1: provider NewPair must return exactly one value, or a value and an error
  help: example: func NewGreeter() (*Greeter, error)
